items.title: Machine Diagnostics and Machine Phenotyping of Migraine: A HUNT Study.
items.abstract: In the absence of biomarkers, the true biological footprint of migraine remains incompletely understood. It could perhaps be best characterized using machine learning models of multimodal data. The aim of this study was to (1) develop diagnostic models of migraine using multimodal data and (2) identify data-driven migraine phenotypes. This was a cross-sectional machine learning analysis of demographics, self-reported clinical and headache data, and genome-wide genotype data from the Trøndelag Health Study (data collected 1995-1997 and 2006-2008). All participants who were genotyped and completed the headache questionnaire were included. First, predictive machine learning models were developed using genotype data and general clinical data (excluding headache data) to diagnose individuals with migraine vs headache-free controls. Models were optimized on a training set and evaluated on a held-out test set, scored with the area under the receiver operating characteristic curve (AUC). Second, unsupervised models were trained on the headache data and the most predictive features from the diagnostic models to identify subgroups. The subgroups were compared using genome-wide association analyses, conventional polygenic risk scores (PRSs), and machine learning-based genetic risk scores. A total of 43,197 individuals were included in the diagnostic models, and 12,185 individuals were included in the data-driven phenotyping (mean [SD] age 49.1 [16.7] years; 51.7% women). The top-performing diagnostic model was a light gradient boosting machine, with a test set AUC of 0.80 (95% CI 0.78-0.81). Two main clusters were identified, one with 1,425 individuals, 94% of whom met diagnostic criteria for migraine, and another with 10,760 individuals, whereof 71% had nonmigraine headaches. The former was subclustered into 4 relatively distinct groups: one with only men, one with prominent neck pain, one with more musculoskeletal pain, anxiety and depression, and one with "classic" migraine. The groups were better discriminated by machine learning-based genetic risk scores compared with PRSs. Migraine can accurately be diagnosed from nonheadache data, suggesting that it is biologically describable by combinations of clinical, genetic, and environmental data. Data-driven phenotyping with such data identifies migraine subgroups with distinct phenotypic and genotypic signals, possibly not captured by current diagnostic criteria-but with potential implications for management.
items.summary_ja:
背景：片頭痛の生物学的特徴はバイオマーカーがなく十分に解明されていない。多様なデータを用いた機械学習モデルでの解析が有効と考えられる。  
方法：ノルウェーのTrøndelag Health Studyの人口統計、自己申告の臨床・頭痛データ、全ゲノム遺伝子型データを用いた横断的機械学習解析を実施。頭痛の有無を診断するモデルを遺伝子型と一般臨床データから構築し、さらに頭痛データと診断モデルの特徴を用いた非教師ありクラスタリングで片頭痛のデータ駆動型フェノタイプを同定した。  
結果：43,197名の診断モデルで、LightGBMによるモデルがAUC0.80を達成。12,185名のフェノタイピングでは、94%が片頭痛の1,425名のクラスターと、71%が非片頭痛頭痛の10,760名のクラスターに分類された。片頭痛クラスターはさらに4つの特徴的サブグループに分かれ、機械学習ベースの遺伝的リスクスコアが従来の多遺伝子リスクスコアよりも群分けに優れていた。  
結論：片頭痛は頭痛以外の臨床・遺伝・環境データの組み合わせで高精度に診断可能であり、データ駆動型フェノタイピングにより従来の診断基準では捉えきれない多様な片頭痛サブタイプが明らかになった。これらは治療方針の改善に寄与する可能性がある。
items.summary_short_ja: 本研究は、頭痛バイオマーカーがない中で、多様なデータを用いた機械学習により片頭痛の診断モデル構築とデータ駆動型の片頭痛表現型の同定を目指した。約4万3千人のデータから、非頭痛データで片頭痛を高精度（AUC=0.80）に診断可能と示し、さらに頭痛特徴と遺伝情報に基づく4つの異なる片頭痛サブグループを特定。これらは従来の診断基準では捉えにくい遺伝的・臨床的特徴を持ち、治療方針への応用が期待される。

items.title: Acute Environmental Triggers and Intermediate-Term Modulators of Emergency Migraine-Related Health Care Encounters.
items.abstract: Migraine activity is shaped not only by the biological vulnerability but also by environmental factors that may influence susceptibility and contribute to fluctuations in migraine occurrence, although the evidence remains inconsistent. We aimed to evaluate the intermediate-term and short-term effects of environmental exposures on migraine activity and to examine a conceptual layered model comprising biological vulnerability, intermediate-term environmental modulators, and acute triggers. We conducted a population-based case-crossover study among patients with migraine identified from the Negev Migraine Cohort (2000-2023), using electronic medical records from Clalit Health Services and Soroka University Medical Center. Eligible participants were adult patients (≥18 years) residing in Be'er Sheva, Israel, with migraine diagnoses or triptan prescriptions. Daily exposure to air pollutants and meteorologic conditions were obtained from fixed monitoring stations. Outcomes were emergency migraine-related encounters as a marker of triggered events and quarterly triptan use as a marker for disease activity. Intermediate-term modulators were defined as weekly climatic conditions hypothesized to modify the short-term effects of daily exposures. Associations were evaluated using conditional logistic and Poisson regression. The analysis included 7,032 adult patients with migraine residing in Be'er Sheva. Short-term exposure to nitrogen dioxide (NO Short-term and cumulative exposure to ambient air pollution and climatic factors were associated with increased migraine activity. Although these findings support a layered model of environmental modulation of migraine activity, their generalizability is limited by the use of emergency health care encounters as a proxy outcome, underscoring the need for further research using complementary measures.
items.summary_ja:
背景：片頭痛の発症は生物学的脆弱性だけでなく、環境要因も影響し、発症頻度の変動に寄与すると考えられるが、証拠は一貫していない。  
方法：イスラエルのベールシェバ在住の成人片頭痛患者7,032名を対象に、2000～2023年の電子医療記録を用いた症例交差研究を実施。大気汚染物質（特に二酸化窒素）や気象条件の短期・中期曝露と、救急受診やトリプタン使用頻度との関連を条件付きロジスティック回帰およびポアソン回帰で解析した。中期調整因子は週単位の気候条件と定義。  
結果：短期および累積的な大気汚染曝露と気象要因は、救急受診による片頭痛発作の増加およびトリプタン使用頻度の上昇と有意に関連した。  
結論：片頭痛活動は生物学的脆弱性に加え、中期的環境調整因子と急性トリガーの多層モデルで説明可能であるが、救急受診を指標としたため一般化には限界があり、補完的評価を用いたさらなる研究が必要である。
items.summary_short_ja: 本研究は、イスラエル・ベールシェバ在住の7,032人の片頭痛患者を対象に、大気汚染や気象条件が片頭痛発作に与える短期および中期の影響を調査した。特に二酸化窒素などの大気汚染物質への曝露が、緊急医療受診やトリプタン使用の増加と関連し、環境要因が生物学的脆弱性に加え片頭痛活動を層状に調節するモデルを支持した。ただし、緊急受診を指標としたため一般化には限界があり、さらなる検証が必要である。

items.title: The Prevalence and Incidence of Cluster Headache: A Norwegian Population-Based Time-Trend Study.
items.abstract: Data on time trends in cluster headache epidemiology are sparse. The aim of this study was to report trends in prevalence and incidence of cluster headache in Norway over a 14-year period. We conducted a registry-based study using linked data from the Norwegian Registry for Primary Health Care, the Norwegian Control and Payment of Health Reimbursements Database, the Norwegian Patient Registry, the Norwegian Prescribed Drug Registry, and Statistics Norway from 2009 to 2022. Data included diagnostic codes, prescriptions, and education. Adults (age ≥18 years) were included. Cluster headache prevalence was defined as ≥2 contacts (clinical consults or prescriptions) for cluster headache in a 365-day period. Age-standardized trends in prevalence and incidence by sex and year, and interactions between education and year, were analyzed with negative binomial regression. We estimated prevalence rate ratio (PRR) and incidence rate ratio per calendar year with 95% CIs. The number of patients with cluster headache increased from 1,029 in 2009 (median age 44 years; 39.7% women) to 1,833 patients in 2022 (median age 47 years; 50.1% women). The annual age-standardized prevalence rate increased from 27.0 to 42.5 per 100,000 in the same period. Women had a 3-fold higher annual increase of 6% (PRR 1.06, 95% CI 1.05-1.07) compared with 2% (PRR 1.02, 95% CI 1.02-1.03) in men. The prevalence rate was higher in women than in men by 2022 (43.4 vs 41.7 per 100,000). The annual prevalence of chronic cluster headache and refractory chronic cluster headache varied between 6%-7% and 1%-2% of all cluster headache cases, respectively. The annual age-standardized incidence rate of cluster headache increased in women, from 10.1 to 14.6 per 100,000 from 2012 to 2022 and decreased in men, from 13.5 to 11.0 per 100,000. Incidence and prevalence rates were higher among individuals with lower education. Prevalence increased over 14 years, possibly reflecting improved diagnostic practices and awareness. These findings challenge previous reports of cluster headache predominantly affecting men, illustrating distinct shifts and trends in disease epidemiology. A limitation was the lack of clinical validation of cluster headache diagnostic codes in primary health care.
items.summary_ja:
背景：群発頭痛の疫学における時間的変化に関するデータは限られている。本研究は、ノルウェーにおける14年間の群発頭痛の有病率および発症率の動向を明らかにすることを目的とした。  
方法：2009年から2022年までのノルウェーの複数の医療・統計データベースを連結し、18歳以上の成人を対象に群発頭痛の診断コードや処方情報を用いて解析を行った。有病率は1年間に2回以上の診療または処方を基準とし、年齢標準化した性別・年別の傾向を負の二項回帰で評価した。  
結果：患者数は2009年の1,029人から2022年の1,833人に増加し、有病率は27.0から42.5/10万人に上昇した。女性の増加率は男性の3倍で、2022年には女性の有病率が男性を上回った。慢性群発頭痛は全体の6～7%、難治性は1～2%を占めた。発症率は女性で増加（10.1→14.6/10万人）、男性で減少（13.5→11.0/10万人）し、教育水準が低いほど高かった。  
結論：群発頭痛の有病率は14年間で増加し、診断精度や認知度の向上が影響している可能性がある。従来の「男性に多い」という認識に対し、女性の割合増加など疫学的変化を示した。ただし、診断コードの臨床的検証が不足している点は限界である。
items.summary_short_ja: ノルウェーにおける2009年から2022年の14年間で、群発頭痛の有病率は年齢調整後で27.0から42.5/10万人に増加し、特に女性で増加率が男性の3倍に達した。発症率は女性で増加（10.1→14.6/10万人）、男性で減少（13.5→11.0/10万人）した。教育水準が低いほど発症率・有病率が高く、診断の向上や認知度の変化が背景と考えられる。従来の男性優位説に異議を唱える結果である。

items.title: Glaucoma Risk Associated With Calcitonin Gene-Related Peptide Inhibitor Use in Migraine: A Multinational Cohort Study.
items.abstract: Migraine has been linked to an increased risk of glaucoma, and our study aims to assess the temporal association between calcitonin gene-related peptide inhibitors (CGRPi) and the risks of glaucoma in individuals with migraine. This multinational retrospective cohort study included adults diagnosed with migraine who received migraine preventive medications in 2018-2024. Participants were categorized into the CGRPi group (erenumab, fremanezumab, galcanezumab, eptinezumab, atogepant, or rimegepant) and non-CGRPi group (valproate, topiramate, flunarizine, candesartan, lisinopril, metoprolol, propranolol, nadolol, amitriptyline, and venlafaxine). Crossovers were not allowed, and the non-CGRPi group included only individuals who never used CGRPi. The CGRPi and non-CGRPi groups were propensity score matched in a 1:1 ratio and were followed for up to 3 years to monitor the occurrence of incident glaucoma. The Cox proportional hazards model was used to compare the risk of glaucoma between CGRPi and non-CGRPi users, with results reported as hazard ratios (HRs) and 95% CIs. A total of 73,644 individuals were included in the final analysis. Compared with non-CGRPi users, CGRPi users experience a lower risk of glaucoma development (HR 0.75; 95% CI 0.61-0.92) within 3 years since its first prescription. Individuals using CGRPi also exhibit a reduced risk of glaucoma compared with those using topiramate (HR 0.73; 95% CI 0.59-0.90), valproate (HR 0.54; 95% CI 0.35-0.83), propranolol (HR 0.76; 95% CI 0.59-0.98), metoprolol (HR 0.76; 95% CI 0.59-0.98), lisinopril (HR 0.49; 95% CI 0.38-0.62), amitriptyline (HR 0.69; 95% CI 0.54-0.89), and venlafaxine (HR 0.68; 95% CI 0.50-0.91). In the analysis that further classified participants based on the specific CGRPi used, only users of monoclonal antibody CGRPi show a reduced risk of glaucoma compared with non-CGRPi users (HR 0.77; 95% CI 0.61-0.98). The reduced risk of glaucoma associated with CGRPi is also observed in older adults, women, and those with chronic migraine or migraine without aura. Among adults with migraine receiving preventive treatment, systemic use of CGRPi, particularly monoclonal antibody CGRPi, is associated with a reduced risk of glaucoma compared with the use of other migraine preventive medications. This is a Class II study demonstrating that CGRPi users with migraine have a lower risk of incident glaucoma when compared with non-CGRPi users with migraine.
items.summary_ja:
背景：片頭痛は緑内障のリスク増加と関連しているが、カルシトニン遺伝子関連ペプチド阻害薬（CGRPi）使用と緑内障発症リスクの関係は不明である。  
方法：2018～2024年に片頭痛と診断され予防薬を使用した成人7万3644人を対象に、多国籍後ろ向きコホート研究を実施。CGRPi群（エレヌマブ等）と非CGRPi群（バルプロ酸等）に分け、交差使用は除外。傾向スコアマッチングで1:1に調整し、最長3年間追跡して緑内障発症を評価。Cox比例ハザードモデルでリスク比較を行った。  
結果：CGRPi使用者は非使用者に比べ緑内障発症リスクが有意に低く（HR 0.75、95%CI 0.61-0.92）、特にモノクローナル抗体型CGRPi使用者で顕著であった。年長者、女性、慢性片頭痛や前兆なし片頭痛患者でも同様の傾向が認められた。  
結論：片頭痛患者において、CGRPi、特にモノクローナル抗体型の使用は他の予防薬に比べ緑内障発症リスクを低減させる可能性が示された。
items.summary_short_ja: 片頭痛患者におけるカルシトニン遺伝子関連ペプチド阻害薬（CGRPi）の使用と緑内障リスクを多国籍コホートで検討した結果、CGRPi使用者は非使用者に比べ3年間で緑内障発症リスクが有意に低下（HR 0.75）した。特にモノクローナル抗体型CGRPiで顕著であり、高齢者や女性、慢性片頭痛患者でも同様の傾向が認められた。CGRPiは他の片頭痛予防薬よりも緑内障リスク低減効果が示された。

items.title: Acute Environmental Triggers and Intermediate-Term Modulators of Emergency Migraine-Related Health Care Encounters.
items.abstract: Migraine activity is shaped not only by the biological vulnerability but also by environmental factors that may influence susceptibility and contribute to fluctuations in migraine occurrence, although the evidence remains inconsistent. We aimed to evaluate the intermediate-term and short-term effects of environmental exposures on migraine activity and to examine a conceptual layered model comprising biological vulnerability, intermediate-term environmental modulators, and acute triggers. We conducted a population-based case-crossover study among patients with migraine identified from the Negev Migraine Cohort (2000-2023), using electronic medical records from Clalit Health Services and Soroka University Medical Center. Eligible participants were adult patients (≥18 years) residing in Be'er Sheva, Israel, with migraine diagnoses or triptan prescriptions. Daily exposure to air pollutants and meteorologic conditions were obtained from fixed monitoring stations. Outcomes were emergency migraine-related encounters as a marker of triggered events and quarterly triptan use as a marker for disease activity. Intermediate-term modulators were defined as weekly climatic conditions hypothesized to modify the short-term effects of daily exposures. Associations were evaluated using conditional logistic and Poisson regression. The analysis included 7,032 adult patients with migraine residing in Be'er Sheva. Short-term exposure to nitrogen dioxide (NO Short-term and cumulative exposure to ambient air pollution and climatic factors were associated with increased migraine activity. Although these findings support a layered model of environmental modulation of migraine activity, their generalizability is limited by the use of emergency health care encounters as a proxy outcome, underscoring the need for further research using complementary measures.
items.summary_ja:
背景：片頭痛の発症は生物学的脆弱性だけでなく、環境要因によっても影響を受けるが、その証拠は一貫していない。本研究は、環境曝露の中期および短期的影響を評価し、生物学的脆弱性、中期的環境調整因子、急性誘発因子からなる多層モデルを検証することを目的とした。  
方法：イスラエルのベールシェバ在住の成人片頭痛患者7,032名を対象に、2000～2023年の電子医療記録を用いたケースクロスオーバー研究を実施。大気汚染物質（特に二酸化窒素）や気象条件のデータを固定観測局から取得し、緊急片頭痛関連受診を急性誘発イベントの指標、四半期ごとのトリプタン使用量を疾患活動性の指標とした。中期的調整因子は週単位の気候条件で定義。条件付きロジスティック回帰およびポアソン回帰で関連を解析。  
結果：短期的および累積的な大気汚染曝露と気象因子は片頭痛活動性の増加と有意に関連した。特に二酸化窒素の曝露が急性発作の誘発に寄与することが示唆された。  
結論：環境要因は片頭痛活動性に多層的に影響を与えることが支持されたが、緊急受診を代理指標としたため一般化には限界があり、補完的指標を用いたさらなる研究が必要である。
items.summary_short_ja: 本研究は、イスラエル・ベールシェバ在住の7,032人の片頭痛患者を対象に、大気汚染や気象条件が片頭痛活動に与える短期および中期の影響を調査した。特に二酸化窒素などの大気汚染物質への曝露が、緊急医療受診やトリプタン使用増加と関連し、片頭痛発症の環境的トリガーおよび調整因子の多層モデルを支持した。ただし、緊急受診を指標としたため一般化には限界があり、さらなる研究が必要である。

items.title: MIDAS and HIT-6 Questionnaires Versus Headache Diaries for Monitoring Treatment Response to Erenumab in Migraine: A REFORM Study.
items.abstract: Headache diaries are the gold standard for assessing preventive migraine treatments but can be burdensome. The Migraine Disability Assessment (MIDAS) and the six-item Headache Impact Test (HIT-6) offer alternatives for monitoring treatment response, though their effectiveness in identifying treatment responders is unclear relative to diary-based measures. This study evaluated how well MIDAS and HIT-6 distinguish responders from non-responders to erenumab, and aimed to determine cut-off scores that best align with a ≥ 50% reduction in monthly migraine days (MMDs). This prospective, open-label study enrolled adults with migraine who received 140 mg erenumab for 24 weeks. Treatment response was a ≥ 50% reduction in MMDs based on diary data. MIDAS and HIT-6 were completed at baseline, Week 12, and Week 24. Discriminative ability and optimal cut-offs were determined using receiver operating characteristic curve analysis. Among 582 participants, 300 individuals (52%) achieved a ≥ 50% reduction in MMDs. MIDAS and HIT-6 demonstrated fair discriminative ability in identifying treatment responders, with area under the curve values ranging from 0.71 to 0.77. The optimal MIDAS cut-offs were either a 16-point absolute reduction (78% sensitivity, 60% specificity) or a 49% relative reduction (82% sensitivity, 64% specificity). For HIT-6, optimal thresholds included an 8-point reduction (53% sensitivity, 84% specificity) or a 12% relative reduction (54% sensitivity, 84% specificity). Sensitivity analyses using alternative response definitions confirmed the primary findings. Although MIDAS and HIT-6 contribute meaningful information on treatment-related disability reduction, these retrospective tools lack sufficient precision to replace prospective headache diaries in assessing response to erenumab. NCT04603976.
items.summary_ja:
背景：片頭痛の予防治療効果を評価する際、頭痛日誌がゴールドスタンダードだが負担が大きい。MIDASおよびHIT-6は代替手段として用いられるが、治療反応者の識別能力は不明であった。  
方法：片頭痛患者582名にエレヌマブ140mgを24週間投与し、頭痛日誌で月間片頭痛日数（MMDs）が50％以上減少した者を治療反応者と定義。MIDASとHIT-6をベースライン、12週、24週で実施し、ROC解析で識別能力と最適カットオフを検討した。  
結果：52％が治療反応者となり、MIDASとHIT-6は反応者識別においてAUC0.71～0.77の中程度の性能を示した。MIDASの最適カットオフは絶対16点減少（感度78％、特異度60％）または相対49％減少（感度82％、特異度64％）。HIT-6は絶対8点減少（感度53％、特異度84％）または相対12％減少（感度54％、特異度84％）が最適であった。  
結論：MIDASとHIT-6は治療関連の障害軽減を示す有用な情報を提供するが、エレヌマブの治療反応評価において頭痛日誌の代替としては精度が不十分である。
items.summary_short_ja: 本研究は、片頭痛治療薬エレヌマブの効果判定において、頭痛日記に代わるMIDASおよびHIT-6質問票の有用性を検証した。582名中52％が月間片頭痛日数を50％以上減少させ、MIDASとHIT-6は治療反応者の識別に一定の能力（AUC 0.71～0.77）を示したが、感度・特異度の最適カットオフ値を設定しても頭痛日記の代替には不十分であった。

items.title: Interictal and Ictal Cognitive Performance in Episodic and Chronic Migraine.
items.abstract: Cognitive dysfunction is a disabling feature of migraine, affecting attention, memory, and executive functions. Differences between episodic and chronic migraine, as well as between interictal and ictal periods, remain unclear. We aimed to compare interictal cognitive performance in episodic and chronic migraine with healthy controls and to evaluate intra-individual changes during attacks. In this cross-sectional study with within-subject repeated measures, migraine patients (32 EM, 32 CM) and 30 matched healthy controls underwent standardized cognitive testing (Mini Mental State Examination, Clock Drawing Test, Stroop Test, Digit Span Forward/Backward Tests) assessing attention, short-term and working memory, and executive function along with Beck Depression Inventory. Migraine cohorts were evaluated interictally (≥ 72 h attack-free) and again within the first 3 h of an untreated spontaneous migraine attack. Interictally, CM patients demonstrated significant impairments in attention, short-term memory, and working memory compared to healthy controls. EM patients, however, showed no cognitive dysfunction except for working memory. During migraine attacks, all cognitive domains deteriorated significantly in both groups. The magnitude of cognitive decline during an attack did not differ between EM and CM. Attack severity was associated with greater cognitive decline during attacks in the general migraine group, but this association was more pronounced in EM than in CM. Migraine is a neurobiological disorder with cognitive consequences that extend beyond pain. Our findings highlight the importance of incorporating cognitive assessment into routine migraine management and reveal the need for longitudinal studies to elucidate the underlying mechanisms of cognitive dysfunction in migraine.
items.summary_ja:
背景：片頭痛は注意力、記憶、実行機能に影響を及ぼす認知機能障害を伴うが、発作間欠期（間欠期）と発作期（発作期）、および反復性（エピソード性）と慢性片頭痛間の認知機能の違いは不明である。  
方法：エピソード性片頭痛（EM）32例、慢性片頭痛（CM）32例、健康対照30例を対象に、Mini Mental State ExaminationやStroop Testなど標準化された認知機能検査を実施。片頭痛患者は発作間欠期（発作から72時間以上空いた状態）と発作開始3時間以内の未治療発作期に評価した。  
結果：間欠期では、CM群が注意力、短期記憶、作業記憶で有意な障害を示したのに対し、EM群は作業記憶のみ軽度の障害を認めた。発作期には両群とも全認知領域で著しい機能低下が見られたが、その程度に群間差はなかった。発作の重症度は認知機能低下の程度と関連し、特にEM群で強く認められた。  
結論：片頭痛は痛みを超えた神経生物学的疾患であり、認知機能障害が重要な特徴である。臨床管理に認知評価を組み込む必要があり、認知障害の機序解明のための縦断的研究が求められる。
items.summary_short_ja: 片頭痛患者の認知機能を発作間欠期と発作期で比較した結果、慢性片頭痛（CM）は注意力や短期・作業記憶に有意な障害が認められたが、反復性片頭痛（EM）は作業記憶のみ影響を受けた。発作時には両群で全認知機能が著しく低下し、発作の重症度と認知機能低下の関連はEMでより顕著であった。片頭痛は痛み以外にも認知障害を伴い、臨床管理に認知評価の導入が重要である。

items.title: Eptinezumab With Patient Education for Chronic Migraine and Medication-Overuse Headache: The Randomized, Placebo-Controlled RESOLUTION Trial.
items.abstract: Medication-overuse headache (MOH) commonly co-occurs with and complicates chronic migraine (CM). This trial evaluated efficacy and safety of eptinezumab, an anti-calcitonin gene-related peptide monoclonal antibody for migraine prevention-combined with a standardized brief educational intervention (BEI)-in adults with CM and MOH. We report results from the 12-week placebo-controlled period, of which weeks 1-4 was the primary time point. The phase 4, double-blind, placebo-controlled RESOLUTION trial was conducted at 76 specialist clinics across 11 countries. Eligible participants were adults diagnosed with CM and MOH and were randomized 1:1 to eptinezumab 100 mg IV with BEI or placebo IV with BEI. The primary end point was mean change from baseline in monthly migraine days (MMDs; weeks 1-4). Key secondary end points (multiplicity-controlled) included changes from baseline in monthly headache days, monthly days with acute migraine medication use, and average daily pain, as well as fulfillment of thresholds defining CM and MOH. Treatment-emergent adverse events (TEAEs) were assessed. Between July 2022 and March 2025, 608 participants were randomized, and 596 (98%) completed the placebo-controlled period. Of 604 participants treated, 517 (86%) were female and 87 (14%) were male; the mean age was 45.5 years (SD 12.0). The primary end point, mean change from baseline in MMDs (weeks 1-4), favored eptinezumab with BEI vs placebo with BEI (-6.9 vs -3.7; group difference -3.2; 95% CI -4.2 to -2.2;  In adults with CM and MOH who also received patient education, eptinezumab was statistically superior to placebo on the primary and all key secondary end points, reducing disease burden as early as weeks 1-4 and throughout weeks 1-12. Eptinezumab was generally well tolerated, with no new safety signals identified. Together, data from this trial indicate that eptinezumab in combination with patient education is an effective treatment for reducing disease burden in patients living with CM complicated by medication overuse. ClinicalTrials.gov Identifier: NCT05452239 (clinicaltrials.gov/study/NCT05452239); EudraCT Number: 2021-003049-40 (clinicaltrialsregister.eu/ctr-search/search?query=2021-003049-40); EU CTR Number: 2024-510729-24-00 (euclinicaltrials.eu/search-for-clinical-trials/?lang=en&EUCT=2024-510729-24-00). EudraCT Number obtained: May 25, 2021. ClinicalTrials.gov Identifier obtained: July 6, 2022. First patient enrolled: July 1, 2022. This clinical trial provides Class I evidence that eptinezumab with patient education is superior to placebo with patient education in reducing MMDs in adults with CM and MOH.
items.summary_ja:
背景：慢性片頭痛（CM）に薬物乱用頭痛（MOH）が併発すると治療が困難になる。本試験は、抗カルシトニン遺伝子関連ペプチド抗体であるエプチネズマブと標準化された簡易教育介入（BEI）の併用効果を評価した。  
方法：11か国の76施設で、CMかつMOHと診断された成人608名を対象に、エプチネズマブ100mg静注＋BEI群とプラセボ静注＋BEI群に1:1で無作為割付。主要評価項目は投与後1～4週の月間片頭痛日数（MMD）のベースラインからの変化。副次評価項目には月間頭痛日数、急性薬使用日数、平均日痛みなどを含む。安全性も評価。  
結果：596名（98%）が12週間の盲検期間を完了。エプチネズマブ群はMMDが-6.9日、プラセボ群は-3.7日で、群間差は-3.2日（95%CI -4.2～-2.2）と有意に改善。副次評価項目もすべてエプチネズマブ群で優位に改善。安全性は良好で新たな懸念なし。  
結論：CMとMOHを有する成人において、患者教育と併用したエプチネズマブはプラセボよりも有意に片頭痛日数を減少させ、疾患負荷軽減に効果的かつ安全な治療法である。
items.summary_short_ja: 慢性片頭痛（CM）と薬物乱用頭痛（MOH）を有する成人を対象に、抗CGRP抗体エプチネズマブと患者教育（BEI）の併用効果を検証した二重盲検プラセボ対照試験（RESOLUTION試験）で、エプチネズマブ群はプラセボ群に比べて1～4週目の月間片頭痛日数が有意に減少した（-6.9日対-3.7日）。副作用は軽微で安全性も良好であった。エプチネズマブと患者教育の併用は、CMとMOH患者の症状軽減に有効であることが示された。

items.title: Unveiling Resting-State Functional Connectivity Patterns in Patients With Migraine: A REFORM Study.
items.abstract: fMRI has proven useful in dissecting the neurobiological underpinnings of migraine. However, the existing evidence is limited by small samples, use of suboptimal statistical thresholds, and different methods of clinical data acquisition. Given these limitations, we hypothesized that a large, well-characterized sample would allow a clearer distinction between resting-state functional connectivity (rs-FC) alterations specific to migraine and those related to migraine subtypes. Adults with migraine and age-matched and sex-matched healthy controls (HCs) underwent a single 3T rs-fMRI scan. We compared rs-FC between migraine and HCs, and across migraine subtypes, using multi-voxel pattern and seed-based analysis. General linear models and analysis of covariance tests with Bonferroni-adjusted cluster-wise family-wise error correction ( We analyzed rs-fMRI data from 264 participants with migraine (mean age 42 ± 12 years, 234 women) and 151 HCs (mean age 41 ± 11 years, 130 women). The multi-voxel pattern analysis identified significant rs-FC differences in a cluster within the bilateral middle cingulate cortex when comparing participants with migraine to HCs ( The identified rs-FC alterations between the middle cingulate cortex and occipital regions might represent a migraine-specific trait, suggesting an integration of nociceptive and visual processing. This discovery provides novel insights into the neurobiological underpinnings of migraine and proposes that altered cingulate-occipital rs-FC might serve as a potential biomarker for migraine.
items.summary_ja:
背景：片頭痛の神経生物学的基盤を解明するため、fMRIによる安静時機能的結合性（rs-FC）の解析が有用とされるが、従来研究はサンプル数の少なさや統計的閾値の不適切さ、臨床データ取得方法の違いに制約があった。  
方法：片頭痛患者264名（平均42歳、女性234名）と年齢・性別を一致させた健常対照151名（平均41歳、女性130名）に対し、3Tの安静時fMRIを実施。多ボクセルパターン解析およびシードベース解析を用い、片頭痛群と健常群間および片頭痛サブタイプ間のrs-FCを比較した。統計解析は一般線形モデルと共分散分析を用い、Bonferroni補正を適用。  
結果：多ボクセルパターン解析により、両側中帯状皮質におけるrs-FCの有意差が認められ、特に中帯状皮質と後頭部領域間の結合性変化が片頭痛特異的な特徴として抽出された。  
結論：中帯状皮質と後頭部のrs-FC変化は、疼痛処理と視覚処理の統合を示唆し、片頭痛の神経生物学的基盤の新たな知見を提供する。これらの結合性変化は片頭痛の潜在的バイオマーカーとなり得る。
items.summary_short_ja: 本研究は、264名の片頭痛患者と151名の健常者を対象に3T静止状態fMRIを用いて、片頭痛特有の脳機能結合パターンを解析した。結果、両側中帯状皮質と後頭部領域間の機能的結合の変化が片頭痛に特有であることを示し、痛覚と視覚処理の統合異常が示唆された。この結合異常は片頭痛の神経生物学的特徴および潜在的バイオマーカーとなり得る。

items.title: Long-Term Effectiveness and Persistence Factors of Anti-CGRP Monoclonal Antibodies in Migraine: 2-Year Results From the EUREkA Cohort.
items.abstract: The aim of this study was to describe the long-term effectiveness and treatment persistence of anti-calcitonin gene-related peptide (CGRP) monoclonal antibodies (MAbs) in migraine and to identify baseline factors associated with 2-year treatment continuation. A prospective observational multicenter registry-based study of anti-CGRP MAbs was conducted. We analyzed changes in monthly headache days (MHDs) at 24 months (M24) compared with baseline in those who reached M24 (ON-group). We analyzed patterns of response at 4 time points (6, 12, 18, and 24 months). We defined sustained response (SR) as a ≥50% reduction in MHDs at ≥3 of 4 time points. We compared baseline characteristics of the ON-group with those of the discontinuation group because of lack of effectiveness (OFF-group). A total of 1,340 individuals reached M24 (ON-group: median age 48.0 [41.0-55.0] years; 81.7% female). The median MHD at baseline was 20.0 (13.0-28.0) days. At M24, 60.4% of patients demonstrated ≥50% reduction in MHDs (809/1,340). The proportion of participants achieving SR at M24 was 53.8% (142/264). When compared with the ON-group (n = 1,340), the OFF-group (n = 1,057) showed statistically significant higher baseline MHDs (ON: 20.0 [13.0-28.0] vs OFF: 25.0 [16.0-28.0]) and a greater proportion of patients with aura (ON: 16.2% vs OFF: 22.9%), depression (ON: 22.8% vs OFF: 37.9%), and obesity (ON: 7.2% vs OFF: 19.1%) ( Sustained reductions in MHDs to anti-CGRP treatment at 2 years was observed. Delayed treatment onset, migraine with aura, depression, and obesity may negatively affect treatment persistence. This study provides Class IV evidence that, in patients with migraine, treatment with anti-CGRP MAbs is associated with sustained reductions in MHDs over a 24-month period.
items.summary_ja:
【背景】片頭痛治療における抗CGRPモノクローナル抗体（MAbs）の長期効果と治療継続要因の解明が求められている。  
【方法】多施設の前向き観察研究で、抗CGRP MAbs治療患者1,340名の24か月後の月間頭痛日数（MHDs）変化を解析。6、12、18、24か月の4時点での反応パターンを評価し、50%以上のMHDs減少が3回以上持続した場合を持続反応（SR）と定義。治療継続群（ON群）と効果不十分で中止した群（OFF群）のベースライン特性を比較。  
【結果】ON群の中央値MHDは20日から24か月後に60.4%が50%以上減少。SR達成率は53.8%。OFF群はON群に比べ、ベースラインでMHDが多く、片頭痛の前兆、うつ病、肥満の割合が有意に高かった。  
【結論】抗CGRP MAbsは2年間にわたりMHDを持続的に減少させる効果があり、治療開始の遅れや片頭痛の前兆、うつ病、肥満は治療継続に悪影響を及ぼす可能性が示された。
items.summary_short_ja: 本研究は、抗CGRPモノクローナル抗体の片頭痛に対する2年間の長期効果と治療継続要因を検討した。1340例で月間頭痛日数が中央値20日から60.4%が50%以上減少し、53.8%が持続的な改善を示した。一方、治療中断群は頭痛日数が多く、オーラ、うつ病、肥満の割合が高かった。これらの因子が治療継続に負の影響を与える可能性が示された。抗CGRP抗体は24か月間にわたり頭痛軽減効果を持続することが示された。
